diagnostics.message: Constraint 'orphanCheck' is declared outside any entity and is not lowered to IR; it has no effect at runtime. Move it inside the entity it should guard.
Constraint 'badField' has an unknown field 'rule'; the field is ignored.
Schedule 'cleanup' is declared inside entity 'Widget' and is not lowered to IR; it has no effect at runtime. Declare schedules at the top level.
